lessons.title: 1.1 · What Memecoins Really Are
lessons.content:
# What Memecoins Really Are
## Core Idea
Memecoins are attention markets.
Not technology.
Not fundamentals.
Not utility.
## The 4 Drivers of Memecoin Value
- Community
- Viral Potential
- Emotional Reaction
- Accessibility
## Action Exercise
Open Dexscreener. Look at 3 new tokens.
## Quick Quiz
What drives memecoin price the most? C — attention.
---

lessons.title: 1.2 · Why Solana Is the Best Chain for Memecoins
lessons.content:
# Why Solana Is the Best Chain for Memecoins
- Extremely Low Fees
- Lightning Fast Transactions
- Strong Memecoin Ecosystem
- High Liquidity
## Quick Quiz
Why is Solana ideal? B — cheaper fees.
---

lessons.title: 1.3 · The Memecoin Lifecycle
lessons.content:
# The Memecoin Lifecycle
- Phase 1: Launch
- Phase 2: Hype
- Phase 3: Pump
- Phase 4: Dump
Key strategy: best entry is usually Hype.
---

lessons.title: 1.4 · Memecoin Narratives
lessons.content:
# Memecoin Narratives
- Animal & Cult Memes
- News & Politics
- Internet Culture
- AI Memes
- Influencer / TikTok Memes
- Beta Plays
---

lessons.title: 1.5 · Realistic Expectations
lessons.content:
# Realistic Expectations
- 70–80% failures
- 15–20% small winners
- 3–5% big winners
- <1% massive winners
Rule: never risk more than 1–2% per trade.
---

lessons.content:
# Crypto Market Cycles
- Bear Market
- Pre-Bull
- Bull Market
- Euphoria

lessons.title: 1.7 · Choose Your Trading Style
lessons.content:

lessons.title: 3.1 · The Memecoin Sweet Spot
lessons.content:
# The Memecoin Sweet Spot
- Market cap: $10K–$5M
- Age: 1–14 days
- Liquidity: min $5K

lessons.title: 3.2 · Scanner Filtering Strategy
lessons.content:
# Scanner Filtering Strategy
Use filters:
- market cap
- age
- liquidity
- at least one social

lessons.title: 3.3 · Smart Money Tracking
lessons.content:
# Smart Money Tracking
Track profitable wallets (Axiom / BullX / GMGN).
Strong signal: multiple smart wallets buying same coin.

lessons.title: 3.4 · Narrative Detection
lessons.content:
# Narrative Detection
Narratives drive valuation: AI, politics, viral memes, etc.

lessons.title: 3.5 · Fast Opportunity Evaluation
lessons.content:
# Fast Opportunity Evaluation
Checklist:
1. meme clear
2. market cap sweet spot
3. active community
4. smart wallets buying
---

lessons.title: 4.1 · The 30-Second Scam Check
lessons.content:
# The 30-Second Scam Check
Check:
- insiders
- snipers
- top holders
- volume quality
- holders count
- pro trader participation

lessons.title: 4.2 · Insider Wallets
lessons.content:
# Insider Wallets
Too much insider allocation = dump risk.

lessons.title: 4.3 · Sniper Bots
lessons.content:
# Sniper Bots
Too many snipers can crash a launch.

lessons.title: 4.4 · Holder Distribution
lessons.content:
# Holder Distribution
Healthy = many holders, low concentration.

lessons.title: 4.5 · Real vs Fake Volume
lessons.content:
# Real vs Fake Volume
Fake volume signs: repeated identical trades.

lessons.title: 4.6 · Holder Growth
lessons.content:
# Holder Growth
Steady holder growth = stronger network effect.

lessons.title: 4.7 · Pro Trader Participation
lessons.content:
# Pro Trader Participation
Useful signal when combined with other checks.
---

lessons.title: 5.1 · The Entry Timing Problem
lessons.content:
# The Entry Timing Problem
Avoid buying huge spikes; prefer pullbacks.

lessons.title: 5.2 · Fibonacci Retracement
lessons.content:
# Fibonacci Retracement
Key levels: 0.5 / 0.618 / 0.786.
Golden pocket: 0.618–0.65.

lessons.title: 5.3 · Volume Confirmation
lessons.content:
# Volume Confirmation
Rising price with rising volume = stronger move.

lessons.title: 5.4 · Profit Taking Strategy
lessons.content:
# Profit Taking Strategy
Use staged exits (example 25% at each target).

lessons.title: 5.5 · Position Sizing
lessons.content:
# Position Sizing
Never risk more than 2% per trade.

lessons.title: 5.6 · Recognizing Topping Signals
lessons.content:
# Recognizing Topping Signals
Watch double tops, exhaustion candles, falling volume.
---

lessons.content:
# The Multi-Wallet System
- Trench Wallet

lessons.title: 6.2 · Trading With Profit Instead of Capital
lessons.content:
# Trading With Profit Instead of Capital
Use profits for risk, protect core capital.

lessons.title: 6.3 · Capital Allocation Strategy
lessons.content:
# Capital Allocation Strategy
Example:
- 70% protected
- 20% medium risk
- 10% trench

lessons.title: 6.4 · Emotional Discipline
lessons.content:
# Emotional Discipline
Avoid greed, FOMO, revenge trading.

lessons.title: 6.5 · Long-Term Survival Strategy
lessons.content:
# Long-Term Survival Strategy
Goal: survive long enough to catch multiple winners.
---

lessons.title: 7.1 · The Emotional Rollercoaster
lessons.content:
# The Emotional Rollercoaster
Separate emotion from decisions.

lessons.title: 7.2 · FOMO
lessons.content:
# FOMO
Enter on plan, not social pressure.

lessons.title: 7.3 · Greed
lessons.content:
# Greed
Take profits with predefined targets.

lessons.title: 7.4 · Revenge Trading
lessons.content:
# Revenge Trading
Pause and reset after losses.

lessons.title: 7.5 · Discipline
lessons.content:
# Discipline
Rules separate traders from gamblers.

lessons.title: 7.6 · Long-Term Mindset
lessons.content:
# Long-Term Mindset
Think probabilities over many trades.
